title: SWD hosts coaching clinic for girls
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The SWD Women Youth...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The SWD Women Youth Training Centre (YTC) recently hosted a series of coaching clinics for players between U14 and U20.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The SWD Women Youth Training Centre (YTC) recently hosted a series of coaching clinics for players between U14 and U20."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There was a clinic in George, one in Mossel Bay and another in Oudtshoorn.","html":"There was a clinic in George, one in Mossel Bay and another in Oudtshoorn."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In Mossel Bay, various schools' girls showed up on 17 September to take part in the day, including Indwe Secondary and Imekhaya, Isalathiso and Erika Primary."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Local community coach Stanley Kama said the day served as an introduction into rugby for beginners.","html":"Local community coach Stanley Kama said the day served as an introduction into rugby for beginners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Along with practical skills, the girls were taught the values of rugby: discipline, respect, integrity, passion and solidarity.","html":"Along with practical skills, the girls were taught the values of rugby: discipline, respect, integrity, passion and solidarity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Various coaches, including Coach Sammy Oktober of the YTC, assisted with the clinic.","html":"Various coaches, including Coach Sammy Oktober of the YTC, assisted with the clinic."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The session started with a dynamic warm-up, whereafter the girls moved through various skill stations, including catching and passing the ball, tackle techniques as well as ball placement.","html":"The session started with a dynamic warm-up, whereafter the girls moved through various skill stations, including catching and passing the ball, tackle techniques as well as ball placement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: SWD hosts coaching clinic for girls
